nasb.text: Now while the people were in a state of expectation and all were wondering in their hearts about John, as to whether he was the Christ,

esv.text: As the people were in expectation, and all were questioning in their hearts concerning John, whether he might be the Christ,

cnv.text: 那時眾人正在期待，人人心裡都在猜想會不會約翰就是基督。

ccb.text: 当时的百姓正期待着基督的来临，大家心里都在猜想，也许约翰就是基督。

csbs.text: 当时，民众都在心里对约翰有期待并猜想，或许他就是基督。
